product_updates.title: OpenAI updates its Agents SDK to help enterprises build safer, more capable agents
product_updates.content: OpenAI has expanded the capabilities of its agent-building toolkit, as agentic AI continues to grow in popularity.

product_updates.title: Hightouch reaches $100M ARR fueled by marketing tools powered by AI
product_updates.content: The startup says it grew its ARR by $70 million in just 20 months after launching an AI agent platform for marketers.

product_updates.title: LinkedIn data shows AI isn’t to blame for hiring decline… yet
product_updates.content: LinkedIn says hiring is down 20% since 2022, but blames higher interest rates — not AI — for the slowdown.

product_updates.title: AI learning app Gizmo levels up with 13M users and a $22M investment
product_updates.content: Gizmo, an AI-powered learning platform, has attracted more than 13 million users and just secured $22 million in Series A funding.

product_updates.title: Can AI judge journalism? A Thiel-backed startup says yes, even if it risks chilling whistleblowers
product_updates.content: Objection, a Thiel-backed startup, aims to use AI to judge journalism, letting users pay to challenge stories. Critics warn it could chill whistleblowers and reshape how media accountability works.

product_updates.title: Google rolls out a native Gemini app for Mac
product_updates.content: You can share anything on their screen with Gemini to get help with what they're looking at in the moment, including local files.

product_updates.title: The musician-turned-biotech-founder waiting to fundraise
product_updates.content: When Grammy-nominated singer-songwriter Aloe Blacc got COVID despite being vaccinated and boosted, he tried to fund research for a better solution. What he quickly found out? You can’t just write a check in biotech. Regulators require a commercialization plan, and philanthropy doesn’t move scienc…

product_updates.title: India’s vibe-coding startup Emergent enters OpenClaw-like AI agent space
product_updates.content: Emergent's Wingman lets users manage and automate tasks through chat on platforms like WhatsApp and Telegram.

product_updates.title: After sale of its shoe business, Allbirds pivots to AI
product_updates.content: Allbirds is ditching wool sneakers for AI servers, rebranding as NewBird AI after locking in a $50M convertible financing facility.

product_updates.title: Reid Hoffman weighs in on the ‘tokenmaxxing’ debate
product_updates.content: Reid Hoffman says tracking AI token use can gauge adoption, but cautions it should be paired with context and not treated as a direct productivity metric.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech
technical_breakthroughs.content: Our newest audio model introduces granular audio tags that give you precise control to direct AI speech for expressive audio generation.

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: NASA’s nuclear spacecraft and unveiling our AI 10
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. technical_breakthroughs.title: Cyberscammers are bypassing banks’ security with illicit tools sold on Telegram
technical_breakthroughs.content: From inside a money-laundering center in Cambodia, an employee opens a popular Vietnamese banking app on his phone. technical_breakthroughs.title: No one’s sure if synthetic mirror life will kill us all
technical_breakthroughs.content: For four days in February 2019, some 30 synthetic biologists and ethicists hunkered down at a conference center in Northern Virginia to brainstorm high-risk, cutting-­edge, irresistibly exciting ideas that the National Science Foundation should fund. technical_breakthroughs.title: Building trust in the AI era with privacy-led UX
technical_breakthroughs.content: The practice of privacy-led user experience (UX) is a design philosophy that treats transparency around data collection and usage as an integral part of the customer relationship.
